scripts.dev: corepack pnpm run verify:compat && corepack pnpm --filter @newbe-notes/site dev
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run verify:compat && corepack pnpm --filter @newbe-notes/site build
scripts.preview: corepack pnpm run verify:compat && corepack pnpm --filter @newbe-notes/site preview
scripts.check: corepack pnpm run verify:compat && corepack pnpm --filter @newbe-notes/site check
